reviews.review_description:
The game is ugly, forgiveable if it would have functionality.
The game dimensions are 2x larger than your space. 
The controls for excavators are horrible.

In-game; 
left virtual stick drives excavator tracks.
Right virtual stick does all arm, boom, bucket moves with just two axis.

In reality, you need two sticks, and four pedals for operations. At minimum you need two sticks for four moves for bucket. More via shift to tilt it, use tracks etc.
